block_00: Learn to trade CFD contracts on cryptos
block_01: The process of buying and selling cryptos on a crypto exchange can be tedious and complex: creating a separate account, passing multiple steps of verification and then storing cryptocurrency may seem like a lot of work. However, when trading CFD contracts, all these steps are unnecessary — you can access cryptos right in your traderoom.
block_02: If you want to buy and sell cryptos quickly, without large investments and big commitments, this type of trading might be for you.
block_03: In this article, we have collected all the information about trading cryptocurrency on the platform, the pros and cons as well as examples. Check the full article to master crypto trading on IQ Option.
